abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

abilities.name: Revitalizing Ichor
abilities.text: During enemy activations, after a friendly model within 8" is within range of a friendly (r) generated by Black Blood, it may heal 1.

triggers.name: Blood for Blood
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to this model. Any enemy models within range of the Black Blood (Y) that cannot gain an Injured token because they already have one are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Accursed Blood
triggers.text: Remove a Glutted token. When resolving, deal +2 damage.

actions.name: Corrupted Shotgun
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (Y)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Necrotic Charge
triggers.text: When resolving, damage dealt from this action is irreducible, and another ally within range may count as having made the attack for its Relish in Blood ability.

triggers.name: Blood Spray
triggers.text: An ally within 2" of the target gains a Glutted token.

actions.name: Black Blood Pustule
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Target a friendly model with Black Blood.
actions.effects: Resolve the target's Black Blood ability as if it had just suffered damage, and increase the (Y) it generates by +1".

triggers.name: Meat for the Young
triggers.text: An ally within 6" gains a Glutted token.
